description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block structure with a brick-patterned exterior and a partially open top revealing an internal wooden framework. The block's sides are uniformly covered in light gray bricks, giving it a robust and urban appearance. The top surface is mostly open, exposing a grid of wooden beams and what appears to be a translucent or glass-like material beneath, possibly simulating a skylight or protective cover. One corner of the block features a stepped or indented section, adding architectural interest and suggesting a functional or decorative purpose. The interior framework is detailed, with visible crossbeams and a small enclosed area, hinting at possible utility or access points. The overall construction suggests durability and integration into a larger built environment, such as a retaining wall or foundation.
description: A large, rectangular stone block with a brick-patterned exterior and an open top revealing a wooden framework and translucent panels. One corner is indented, and the structure appears robust and urban.
description_view_0: The block is seen from above with the indented corner in the foreground, showing the open top and detailed wooden framework inside.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the long, uninterrupted brick wall and the open top, with the indented section visible on the left.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows a flat brick face and the open top, with the internal framework and a small enclosed area visible.
description_view_3: This view presents the other long side of the block, with the indented section now on the right and the open top and wooden beams clearly visible.
attribute_location_context: urban retaining wall or foundation in a cityscape
attribute_installation_method: mortared and set on a concrete base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surfaces appear clean and well-maintained, with no signs of moss, chipping, or erosion.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: forms part of a continuous wall
